steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $21$, so the answer is D, $21$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute x = -3 into h(x) = 7|x|
steps.content: We substitute $x = -3$ into the function definition: $$h(-3) = 7|-3|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and simplify
steps.content: The absolute value of $-3$ is $3$. Therefore: $$h(-3) = 7 \cdot 3 = 21$$ The negative input becomes positive before multiplying by $7$. That confirms D is correct.
